description_long: This is a rectangular, two-shelf wooden console table or open shelving unit with a dark brown top and lighter, weathered wood frame. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for displaying decorative items or storing everyday objects. The frame consists of two side panels and a back panel, all in a lighter, distressed wood finish, giving the piece a rustic, industrial look. The two open shelves provide ample storage space and are supported by the side and back panels, with no doors or enclosed compartments. The construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a solid top, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or public spaces. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible handles, glass panels, or decorative hardware.
description: A rustic, two-shelf wooden console table with a dark brown top and lighter, weathered wood frame. It features open shelving and a sturdy, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, two open shelves, and the dark brown top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the top and the depth of the shelves, with the lighter wood side panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and shelf supports, with the same open shelf structure as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the side panel and shelf depth.
